meta.title: Tayfun Türkmen — Web & Security
meta.description: Personal site and blog on web development, architecture, and cybersecurity.

home.headline: Cybersecurity and full-stack development with practical execution.
home.sub: Based on my LinkedIn profile: IT Staff at Yaşam Hastaneler Grubu in Antalya, sharing field notes in English and Turkish.
home.pillar1Body: Performance, DX, and maintainable architecture — not hype-driven stacks.
home.pillar2Body: Threat modeling, hardening, and practical controls for real-world apps.
home.pillar3Body: A guarded auto-blogger pipeline: AI drafts only when secrets are set, never trusted as source of truth.

blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: Essays and field notes. Newest first.
blog.empty: No posts in this language yet.

about.title: About
about.body: I am Tayfun Türkmen. Cyber Security and Full Stack Development are my core focus areas, with current IT operations experience in healthcare systems.
about.summaryBody: Web technologies and cybersecurity enthusiast with hands-on professional experience, bilingual publishing workflow, and a security-first engineering mindset.
about.exp1: IT Staff · Yaşam Hastaneler Grubu (Jun 2025 - Present)
about.exp3: Digital Media Specialist · Ali AYYILDIZ Inter Consultancy (Sep 2024 - Jun 2025)
about.edu3: Full Stack Web Developer Course · GoIT

autoBlog.title: Auto-blogger (secured)
autoBlog.lead: Generate a draft article as Markdown. Requires server environment variables; requests without the correct bearer token are rejected.
autoBlog.topicPlaceholder: e.g. CSP pitfalls in Next.js App Router
autoBlog.unauthorized: This panel is disabled until AUTO_BLOG_PANEL_SECRET is configured and you sign in with it.
autoBlog.hint: Set AUTO_BLOG_PANEL_SECRET in .env.local. For AI output, add OPENAI_API_KEY. The public API uses Authorization: Bearer AUTO_BLOG_SECRET.

admin.title: Admin panel
admin.lead: Create and publish blog posts from this secured panel.
admin.locked: Panel is unavailable until D1 binding is configured.
admin.setupLead: First use only: create username and password (stored in D1).
admin.setupInvalid: Username must be at least 3 chars, password at least 8 chars.
